title: Eid ul Adha Office Closure
content: The office will remain closed from June 16 to June 20, 2026 for Eid ul Adha holidays. Emergency contact numbers will be shared via email.

title: New Health Insurance Policy
content: We are pleased to announce an upgraded health insurance plan covering OPD and hospitalization for all employees and dependents effective July 1, 2026.

title: Quarterly Town Hall - Q2 2026
content: Join us on May 30, 2026 at 3:00 PM in the Karachi office auditorium for our Q2 town hall. Remote employees can join via Zoom link.

title: Engineering Sprint Review
content: Sprint 24 review scheduled for May 28, 2026. All engineering team members must attend and present their deliverables.

title: Ramadan Timings Reminder
content: Office timings during Ramadan were 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Regular timings resume from May 1, 2026.
